name: PLC's Plus International
description: PLCs, HMI and SCADA programming company providing programming services for projects of all sizes

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Fast, efficient, and provided exceptional service. I would definitely work with PLCs Plus again.
Delivered on time and on budget. We're very happy to have PLCs Plus as our partner.
After eight years of partnership, I can attest to the level of service quality they offered.
Bill Scroggins really delivered for me and built a strong client relationship with my company.

sentiment.summary: PLCs Plus International has exceptional reputation with long-term clients across industrial sectors, consistently praised for technical expertise, reliability, responsive account management, and on-time delivery.
